notes: Build #32: Large JSON object like Build #26 (which succeeded with chars visible). 11 keys with warning text values. Body size ~800+ bytes to match Build #26. done event has valid JSON data:{} instead of data:stop. Hypothesis: body size matters for H2 DATA frame flush to EventSource.
